themes.name: AI Semiconductors & Chips
themes.subtitle: GPUs, custom ASICs, memory, and the laggards being left behind

sub_themes.name: GPU / AI Accelerators
sub_themes.thesis: Core compute for training and inference. NVDA ~90% accelerator share.

sub_themes.name: Custom Silicon / ASICs & AI Networking
sub_themes.thesis: Hyperscaler-designed chips + high-speed interconnect.

sub_themes.name: Memory / HBM
sub_themes.thesis: HBM is gate-limiting AI throughput. DRAM supply shortage thesis.

sub_themes.name: Mobile & Edge
sub_themes.thesis: On-device AI — slower-growing adjacent theme.

sub_themes.name: Legacy / Mature Nodes
sub_themes.thesis: Auto, industrial, analog — struggling while AI absorbs capital.

themes.name: Foundry & Semi Equipment
themes.subtitle: TSMC, ASML's EUV monopoly, and the tools powering the AI buildout

sub_themes.name: Leading-Edge Foundry
sub_themes.thesis: Manufactures all advanced AI chips. No alternative.

sub_themes.name: Trailing-Edge Foundry
sub_themes.thesis: Mature-node, auto & industrial. AI-lagging.

sub_themes.name: Lithography
sub_themes.thesis: 100% monopoly in EUV. $200M per system.

sub_themes.name: Deposition, Etch & Process
sub_themes.thesis: Duopoly in wafer fab equipment. TSMC + memory capex beneficiaries.

sub_themes.name: Metrology & Process Control
sub_themes.thesis: Quality control for sub-5nm nodes. 41%+ operating margin.

themes.name: Hyperscalers & AI Software
themes.subtitle: The $700B capex race and who's capturing the returns

sub_themes.name: Hyperscalers
sub_themes.thesis: Own the infrastructure, models, and cloud. ~$700B combined 2026 capex.

sub_themes.name: AI-Native Software & Data
sub_themes.thesis: Picks-and-shovels for enterprise AI workloads.

sub_themes.name: Legacy Enterprise Software + AI
sub_themes.thesis: Adding AI overlays to existing franchises. NOW tracking $1B ACV.

sub_themes.name: Cybersecurity AI
sub_themes.thesis: AI expands attack surface + sophistication. Tier-1 platforms benefit.

themes.name: AI Power & Data Center Infrastructure
themes.subtitle: Nuclear, natural gas, grid equipment, REITs, and cooling

sub_themes.name: Operating Nuclear
sub_themes.thesis: Only assets meeting hyperscaler PPA demand now. Multi-GW deals signed.

sub_themes.name: Small Modular Reactors (SMRs)
sub_themes.thesis: 2030+ power. Pre-revenue, speculative. Venture-style call options.

sub_themes.name: Power Generation Equipment
sub_themes.thesis: Turbines, transformers, switchgear for new AI load.

sub_themes.name: Data Center REITs & Cooling
sub_themes.thesis: Physical real estate AI runs on + liquid cooling infrastructure.

sub_themes.name: Regulated Utilities + AI
sub_themes.thesis: Hybrid utility/merchant models. Data center load growth.

themes.name: AI-Adjacent Sectors
themes.subtitle: Networking, cybersecurity, optical, robotics — the second derivatives

sub_themes.name: AI Data Center Networking
sub_themes.thesis: 400G→800G→1.6T ethernet for AI clusters.

sub_themes.name: Optical Components
sub_themes.thesis: Lasers and modules between racks. Some of the best AI returns.

sub_themes.name: Robotics & Industrial Automation
sub_themes.thesis: Physical AI — applying models to real-world tasks.

sub_themes.name: Autonomous Vehicles
sub_themes.thesis: Long-cycle bet on vision+inference at the edge.

themes.name: Biotech Thematic
themes.subtitle: Next-gen biotech platforms, gene editing, and cell therapy

sub_themes.name: AI-Driven Drug Discovery
sub_themes.thesis: Computational platforms compressing drug discovery timelines.

sub_themes.name: Gene Editing
sub_themes.thesis: CRISPR-Cas9, base editing, prime editing. CRSP has only approved therapy.

sub_themes.name: Commercial-Stage Biotech
sub_themes.thesis: Actual revenue anchoring valuation. Single-asset risk.

sub_themes.name: Picks & Shovels / Large-Cap
sub_themes.thesis: Lower single-stock blowup risk. Capture theme at cost of lower upside.
